underTheFlow.description: Hip-hop live sessions platform with an immersive experience for artists and fans.
underTheFlow.longDescription:
Under The Flow is a platform dedicated to hip-hop live sessions.
The project captures the essence of freestyle and live performances, offering a unique showcase for emerging artists on the French hip-hop scene.

An immersive web experience that highlights music and artists with a strong, modern artistic direction.

intro.title: THE VISION
intro.content: Creating a platform that captures the raw energy of hip-hop live sessions. A space where music comes alive through digital.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Conveying the authenticity and energy of live through a web interface. Creating an immersive experience without sacrificing performance.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Next.js for performance and SEO. Dark, contrasted design to highlight video content. Smooth animations to reinforce immersion.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A platform that shines a light on the French live hip-hop scene with a strong, memorable visual identity.

victorDenay.description: Creative portfolio for a professional videographer and photographer.
victorDenay.longDescription:
Custom portfolio for Victor Denay, videographer and photographer.
A clean design that gives center stage to the artist's visual work, with smooth transitions and intuitive navigation.

The goal was to create a digital showcase that elevates the work while offering a memorable browsing experience.

intro.title: THE BRIEF
intro.content: A portfolio that steps back to let the work shine. Minimalist but impactful, subtle but memorable.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Presenting high-quality video and photo content without compromising load times. Creating a smooth, intuitive gallery.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Mobile-first design. Smart lazy loading. Polished transitions between projects. Minimalist typography.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: An elegant portfolio that showcases Victor's work while delivering a premium user experience.

linekut.description: Image to cutting pattern converter for scroll saw, laser, and vinyl cutting.
linekut.longDescription:
Linekut transforms any image into a ready-to-cut pattern. Whether for scroll saw, laser cutting, vinyl, or stickers, the tool generates optimized files for each technique.

A PWA that democratizes cutting pattern creation, making an usually complex process accessible.

intro.title: THE IDEA
intro.content: Simplifying cutting pattern creation. Transform a photo into a machine-ready file in just a few clicks.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Client-side image processing for speed. Vectorization algorithms and contour simplification.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Canvas API for image processing. Edge detection algorithms. Export in standard formats (SVG, DXF).

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A tool used by makers and craftspeople to quickly create custom cutting patterns.

blenkdev.description: Showcase website for a freelance web development agency specialized in custom solutions.
blenkdev.longDescription:
BlenkDev is the showcase website for freelance web development activity.
A platform that presents services, approach and portfolio in a clear and professional manner.

The goal: inspire trust and demonstrate expertise through a modern visual identity and detailed case studies.

intro.title: THE MISSION
intro.content: Create a professional online presence for freelance activity. A website that inspires trust and demonstrates technical expertise.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Stand out in a saturated market by highlighting my unique skills and client-centered approach.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Modern and clean design. Showcase of completed projects. Clear services section. Client testimonials for credibility.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A showcase website that converts visitors into potential clients and reflects my professional identity.

worktigre.description: Interactive git worktree manager with GitHub CLI, fzf and Claude AI integration.
worktigre.longDescription:
WorkTigre radically simplifies Git branch management through worktrees. One tool to navigate, create, delete and switch between worktrees.

GitHub CLI integration for PRs and issues, fzf for fuzzy navigation, and Claude AI for intelligent assistance. Fix CI, review PRs, problem solving - all from the terminal.

intro.title: THE IDEA
intro.content: Make Git worktree management as simple as switching branches. A powerful yet intuitive CLI.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Create a smooth terminal user experience. Integrate multiple tools (git, gh, fzf, claude) in a coherent way.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: 100% Shell/Bash for portability. Fuzzy navigation with fzf. Native GitHub CLI integration. Claude assistant for complex tasks.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: An open source tool distributed via Homebrew, Nix and universal script. Used daily to manage dozens of worktrees.

tokeneater.description: Native macOS app to monitor your Claude AI usage in real-time.
tokeneater.longDescription:
TokenEater lives in your menu bar and watches your Claude AI usage. Live percentages, color-coded thresholds, native WidgetKit widgets, and a floating overlay showing your active Claude Code sessions.

Smart pacing to know if you're burning through tokens or cruising. Click a session in the overlay to jump to the right terminal.

intro.title: THE NEED
intro.content: Know in real-time how many tokens I have left on Claude. Without opening the browser, without breaking the flow.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Create a performant native macOS app with menu bar, WidgetKit widgets, and a floating overlay. All in pure Swift.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: SwiftUI for UI, WidgetKit for desktop widgets, smart Claude API scraping. Distribution via DMG and Homebrew.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: An app I use all day. Discreet menu bar, desktop widgets, overlay showing my active sessions.

pix2paint.description: Turn any image into a paint-by-numbers grid. 100% in your browser.
pix2paint.longDescription:
Drop your image, adjust settings, get a numbered grid ready to paint. Two modes: classic pixel and smooth with organic contour lines.

Color quantization (max 20), region numbering, PNG export. All processing runs in a Web Worker, zero UI lag. IndexedDB persistence to resume where you left off.

intro.title: THE IDEA
intro.content: Turn a photo into a paint-by-numbers grid in a few clicks. Free, no sign-up, 100% in your browser.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Heavy client-side image processing without blocking the UI. Precise color quantization and organic contours.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Vite + vanilla TypeScript, zero framework. Web Worker for processing, Canvas 2D for rendering, IndexedDB for persistence.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A smooth tool that turns any image into a ready-to-paint grid. High-res PNG export.

yeetbg.description: AI-powered background removal + interactive color editor. Zero server.
yeetbg.longDescription:
Drop an image, AI removes the background, recolor whatever you want. ONNX segmentation in a Web Worker for zero lag. K-means++ clustering in Lab color space to group similar colors.

Interactive editor: click on canvas or palette to remove colors. Recolor individually. Export PNG, JPG or WebP. Full undo/redo.

intro.title: THE IDEA
intro.content: Remove image backgrounds and recolor remaining zones. All in the browser, no upload.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Run an AI model (ONNX) client-side without killing performance. Precise color clustering in Lab space.

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Vite + vanilla TypeScript. @imgly/background-removal in a Web Worker. K-means++ for clustering. Brutalist black/white design.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: A fast, privacy-first tool. Drop, remove, recolor, export. Nothing leaves your browser.

nixdash.description: Interactive terminal interface for managing your Nix packages.
nixdash.longDescription:
NixDash gives Nix a human interface. Browse installed packages, fuzzy search through 177k+ nixpkgs, install or remove with diff preview.

Temporary shells to test packages before installing. External flake management. Keyboard shortcuts for everything. Works with Home Manager, NixOS, and any Nix flake setup.

intro.title: THE IDEA
intro.content: Make Nix accessible. An interactive TUI that replaces cryptic commands with a smooth experience.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Parse the Nix ecosystem (177k+ packages) and offer fast fuzzy search. Support different setups (Home Manager, NixOS).

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: 100% Shell with fzf, gum and jq. Nix flake for distribution. Diff preview before every change.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: An interactive hub for Nix. Browse, search, install, temporary shell - all in a few keystrokes.

envora.description: Encrypted .env vault. Push/pull between machines with age encryption.
envora.longDescription:
Your .env files contain secrets that can't go in git. But they need to exist on every machine. Envora stores them in a private git repo, encrypted with age.

One age key, stored in your password manager, unlocks the entire vault. Push encrypts and stores, pull decrypts and restores. Even if the repo is compromised, your secrets stay safe.

intro.title: THE PROBLEM
intro.content: .env files don't go in git. But you work on 3 machines. Envora solves this dilemma with encryption.

challenge.title: THE CHALLENGE
challenge.content: Transparent encryption, zero friction. One key to unlock everything. Cross-platform (macOS, Linux, WSL).

process.title: THE PROCESS
process.content: Shell + age encryption + git as transport. Nix flake for distribution. fzf/gum interface for selection.

result.title: THE RESULT
result.content: ev push, ev pull. Two commands. All your secrets synced and encrypted.
